items.headline: Spot Bitcoin ETFs record $500M inflows in a single session
items.summary_text: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs attracted more than $500 million in net inflows on January 15, the largest single-day figure since the products launched.
items.alert_reason: Record-setting ETF inflow day is a significant milestone for institutional crypto adoption.

items.headline: OpenAI launches GPT-5 with reasoning capabilities
items.summary_text: OpenAI unveiled GPT-5 with significantly improved reasoning and multi-step problem solving, marking a major leap in large language model capabilities.
items.alert_reason: Major model launch from leading AI lab warrants immediate alert.

items.headline: Fed holds interest rates steady at 4.25-4.50%
items.summary_text: The Federal Reserve maintained the federal funds rate, citing ongoing inflation concerns despite signs of economic cooling.
items.alert_reason: Fed rate decision is always a high-importance event for finance audiences.
